/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/allocator_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/array_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/arg_reduce_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/autograd_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/blas_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/compile_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/custom_vjp_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/creations_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/device_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/einsum_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/export_import_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/eval_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/fft_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/load_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/ops_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/random_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/scheduler_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/utils_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/vmap_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/linalg_tests.cpp.o -o tests  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/rocm-7.2.4/lib ../libmlx.a -ldl -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/liblapack.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libblas.so ../mlx/io/libgguflib.a ../mlx/backend/rocm/libmlx_rocm_kernels.a /opt/rocm-7.2.4/lib/libamdhip64.so /opt/rocm-7.2.4/lib/librocblas.so.5.2.70204 /opt/rocm-7.2.4/lib/libhiprand.so /opt/rocm-7.2.4/lib/libhiprtc.so /opt/rocm-7.2.4/lib/libhipblaslt.so
